title: FOOD PANTRY - 211info
text: SALVATION ARMY GRESHAM CORPS FOOD PANTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a food pantry. Households may pick up a food box up to 12 times per year. Visits must be 30 days apart. 473 SE 194th Avenue Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: Must meet USDA income guidelines Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-11:45am Email (503) 661-8972 413 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 661-8972 ext 413 Inez Chora Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information. Bring own box or bag for produce. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Zip codes 97004, 97009, 97010, 97011, 97013, 97015, 97022, 97023, 97024, 97027, 97030, 97042, 97045, 97055, 97060, 97080, 97230, 97233, 97236 SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-12pm Services: Food Pantries Fresh Food Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - SUMMER OVERNIGHT CAMP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SALVATION ARMY GRESHAM CORPS
